FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Uses a fast string format for timestamp flipping.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Improves the speed of updating timestamps for better performance.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Fetches the current Git hash dynamically for string flags.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Ensures players always have the latest updates for string flags.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Dynamically manages string timestamps for flipping.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Allows for real-time updates to string values, enhancing gameplay experience.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string format for the current Git hash.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Speeds up the retrieval of version information for smoother updates.
